title: The Big Short
author: Michael Lewis
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A house drawn in wireframe, with a CDO/MBS stack of rectangles on top of it (the derivatives). The stack collapses. The crash arrow is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- The house: a 600x300 rectangle with a triangle roof -->
    <path d="M -300 0 L -300 -200 L 0 -360 L 300 -200 L 300 0 Z"/>
    <!-- A door -->
    <rect x="-60" y="-100" width="120" height="100"/>
    <!-- Windows -->
    <rect x="-220" y="-160" width="80" height="60"/>
    <rect x="140" y="-160" width="80" height="60"/>
    <!-- The CDO stack on the roof: 8 small rectangles stacked, getting wider as they go up (the derivatives pyramid) -->
    <g transform="translate(0 -400)" stroke="#cccccc">
      <rect x="-40" y="0" width="80" height="20"/>
      <rect x="-60" y="-22" width="120" height="20"/>
      <rect x="-80" y="-44" width="160" height="20"/>
      <rect x="-100" y="-66" width="200" height="20"/>
      <rect x="-120" y="-88" width="240" height="20"/>
      <rect x="-140" y="-110" width="280" height="20"/>
      <rect x="-160" y="-132" width="320" height="20"/>
      <rect x="-180" y="-154" width="360" height="20"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The collapse: the top 3 stack boxes falling and tilted -->
    <g transform="translate(0 -400)" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <rect x="180" y="-160" width="80" height="20" transform="rotate(45 220 -150)"/>
      <rect x="240" y="-100" width="80" height="20" transform="rotate(60 280 -90)"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A red crash arrow pointing down -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-580" x2="0" y2="-380" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="4"/>
    <polygon points="0,-380 -16,-410 16,-410" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Whisper labels -->
    <text x="-450" y="-20" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="end">AMERICAN HOME</text>
    <text x="450" y="-380" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="start">CDO STACK</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A house wireframe with a CDO stack on top. The top of the stack is collapsing in RED — the moment subprime broke. 320px weight-500 title at the top.
